General.Name: Freetech Road RecyclingTech
General.Description: Freetech Road Recycling Technology (Holdings) Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures and sells road maintenance equipment in Mainland China. It operates through Maintenance Services, Sale of Equipment, and Properties segments. The company also provides road maintenance services. In addition, it offers asphalt pavement maintenance (APM) equipment; and APM services to repair damaged asphalt pavement surfaces under the Road Doctor brand. Further, the company develops, leases, and sells properties. Freetech Road Recycling Technology (Holdings) Limited was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Causeway Bay, Hong Kong.
